# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:3.19

RUN addgroup -g 1000 appgroup && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 -G appgroup appuser && \
    mkdir -p /app /uploads /processed && \
    chown -R appuser:appgroup /app /uploads /processed && \
    chmod 755 /app && \
    chmod 700 /uploads /processed

WORKDIR /app

COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup --chmod=755 process.sh /app/

RUN apk add --no-cache \
    file \
    clamav \
    clamav-daemon \
    freshclam && \
    mkdir -p /var/lib/clamav /var/log/clamav && \
    chown -R clamav:clamav /var/lib/clamav /var/log/clamav && \
    freshclam --quiet || true

RUN echo '#!/bin/sh' > /app/process.sh && \
    echo 'set -e' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo 'MAX_FILE_SIZE=104857600' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo 'ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS="txt pdf jpg jpeg png csv json xml"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo 'validate_file() {' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    local filepath="$1"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    local filename=$(basename "$filepath")' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    local filesize=$(stat -c%s "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$filepath")' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    local extension="${filename##*.}"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    if [ "$filesize" -gt "$MAX_FILE_SIZE" ]; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        echo "ERROR: File $filename exceeds maximum size limit"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        return 1' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    if ! echo "$ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS" | grep -qw "$extension"; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        echo "ERROR: File extension .$extension not allowed for $filename"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        return 1' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    if ! file -b "$filepath" | grep -qiE "text|PDF|JPEG|PNG|CSV|JSON|XML|ASCII"; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        echo "ERROR: File type validation failed for $filename"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        return 1' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    if command -v clamscan >/dev/null 2>&1; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        if ! clamscan --no-summary "$filepath" >/dev/null 2>&1; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '            echo "ERROR: Malware detected in $filename"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '            return 1' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    return 0' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '}' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo 'sanitize_filename() {' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    echo "$1" | sed "s/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/_/g"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '}' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo 'process_files() {' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    if [ ! -d "/uploads" ]; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        echo "ERROR: /uploads directory not found"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        exit 1' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    find /uploads -type f | while read -r file; do' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        if [ -f "$file" ]; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '            echo "Processing: $file"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '            if validate_file "$file"; then' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '                sanitized_name=$(sanitize_filename "$(basename "$file")")' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '                cp "$file" "/processed/$sanitized_name"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '                chmod 600 "/processed/$sanitized_name"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '                echo "SUCCESS: Processed $file -> /processed/$sanitized_name"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '            else' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '                echo "SKIPPED: $file failed validation"' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '            fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '        fi' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '    done' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '}' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/process.sh && \
    echo 'process_files' >> /app/process.sh && \
    chmod 755 /app/process.sh

USER appuser

VOLUME ["/uploads", "/processed"]

ENV MAX_FILE_SIZE=104857600 \
    ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS="txt pdf jpg jpeg png csv json xml"

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD [ -d /uploads ] && [ -d /processed ] || exit 1

CMD ["/app/process.sh"]
